name: Axure Software Solutions - a company with an extremely low level of protection was hacked
message: Who is Axure Software Solutions  The Most Secure (NO!) UX Platform. Don't let security hold you back. Host, share, and gather feedback on your UX design projects and Axure RP files using our secure hosting platform, Axure Cloud for Business.  We implement security practices and tools to protect your information and data, from the system architecture to how we operate. Start building Axure UX prototypes today with a free 30-Day trial of Axure RP & host on our secure platform, Axure Cloud for Business.   Headquarters: 707 Broadway Ste 1600, San Diego, California, 92101, United States Phone Number: (619) 272-4489 Website: www.axure.com
